title: Am Timan Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Am Timan with a Z-Score of +3.49. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Am Timan is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 11.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 46%, and the wind speed is approximately 5.7 km/h, offering little relief. 
 The heat wave is expected to continue, with no heating degree days (HDD) recorded, indicating a significant anomaly in the weather pattern.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to ensure public safety.
